ns0:entry.ns0:title: Aether-Tools/CustomizePlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Aether-Tools/CustomizePlus
Language: c%23
Dalamud plugin designed to give you better control over your Final Fantasy XIV character appearance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Jackett/Jackett
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett
Language: c%23
API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StockSharp/StockSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StockSharp/StockSharp
Language: c%23
Algorithmic trading and quantitative trading open source platform to develop trading robots (stock markets, forex, crypto, bitcoins, and options).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
Language: c%23
Technitium DNS Server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abpframework/abp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abpframework/abp
Language: c%23
Open-source web application framework for ASP.NET Core! Offers an opinionated architecture to build enterprise software solutions with best practices on top of the .NET. Provides the fundamental infrastructure, cross-cutting-concern implementations, startup templates, application modules, UI themes, tooling and documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner
Language: c%23
The Runner for GitHub Actions 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
Language: c%23
An alternative bootstrapper for Roblox with a bunch of extra features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: btcpayserver/btcpayserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver
Language: c%23
Accept Bitcoin payments. Free, open-source & self-hosted, Bitcoin payment processor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gibbed/SteamAchievementManager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gibbed/SteamAchievementManager
Language: c%23
A manager for game achievements in Steam.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jellyfin/jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23
The Free Software Media System - Server Backend & API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/testfx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/testfx
Language: c%23
This repository holds the source code of Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP), a lightweight alternative to VSTest, as well as MSTest adapter and framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: space-wizards/space-station-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/space-wizards/space-station-14
Language: c%23
A multiplayer game about paranoia and chaos on a space station. Remake of the cult-classic Space Station 13.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stakira/OpenUtau
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau
Language: c%23
Open singing synthesis platform / Open source UTAU successor
